title: dryopteris ochrorachis
intro: Dryopteris ochrorachis, also known as the Ochraceous Wood Fern, is a species of fern native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which aid in treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of Dryopteris ochrorachis include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat conditions such as rheumatism and digestive issues.
